evals.name: jsonb-dirty-cast
evals.prompt:
请 Review 下面这段 int_zentao_story_costs.sql 的代码。这段代码负责从禅道的原始 JSONB 数据中提取工时和金额。SQL如下：

```sql
with raw as (
    select * from {{ source('zentao', 'raw_stories') }}
),
final as (
    select
        id,
        cast(data->>'cost' as numeric) as accrued_cost,
        cast(data->>'hours' as numeric) as estimated_hours
    from raw
)
select * from final
```
evals.expected_output: 应识别出铸造 numeric 时的 JSONB 双引号风险和空字符串风险，要求增加 trim(both '"' from ...) 和 nullif 处理。

evals.name: staging-purity-scd2-leak
evals.prompt:
Review 这段 stg_gitlab_projects.sql 代码。它尝试在 Staging 层直接关联组织架构以获取名称。SQL如下：

```sql
select 
    p.id as project_id,
    p.name as project_name,
    o.full_name as org_name
from {{ source('gitlab', 'projects') }} p
left join {{ source('mdm', 'mdm_organizations') }} o on p.org_id = o.id
```
evals.expected_output: 应拦截在 Staging 层使用 JOIN 的违规行为，并指出关联 mdm_organizations 时缺少 is_current=true 过滤导致的历史快照泄露风险。
